title: [FIRRTL] Sub Folder Can't Use AsUInt Before Pad

features.name: subtraction with sign extension semantics
features.description: Code should include a subtraction operation on unsigned values where the result is negative, followed by conversion to signed type for proper sign extension to a larger bit width

features.name: zero extension bug with asUInt before pad
features.description: Code should include a conversion from signed to unsigned type applied before zero padding, demonstrating the incorrect extension pattern

features.name: dshl dynamic shift left with unsigned result
features.description: Code should include a dynamic shift left operation producing a result used in subsequent subtraction where sign extension matters
